creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #4)
I am late at updating the port because i had issues getting list of Go modules.

this time i used modules2tuple in a different way:
1. clone upstream git repo
2. go mod vendor
3. modules2tuple vendor/modules.txt

3rd command gives the whole GH_TUPLE.
